title: Mapwright
body:
#  Mapwright ## DIY (Draw it yourself) Mapwright is a clientside world map mod with one simple twist: you have to draw it yourself. Every mountain, ocean, and cavern is charted by your own hand (...or you can just use it to make silly doodles). In place of omniscient real time updates, you are given tools reminiscent of traditional art programs. Use your trusty spyglass to pinpoint distant destinations and let your imagination fill the gaps.

 ![Handrawn map in a mapbook GUI with a waterfall next to trees. A red x with a trail leads to a cave behind the waterfall.](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1384/519/starmap1.png)

Ok so you know the little guy who lives in the other map mods right? The one who draws them all for you? We fired him. That's your job now. You start Tuesday.
